title: Glacierpunk
description: Explore a snowy world, extract resources, and build your industries! Will you survive in this harsh environment?
body:
### ❄️ Welcome to *Glacierpunk*

You'll spawn in a frozen world where survival depends on how well you manage your temperature.
Craft **campfires**, **warm clothes**, and anything you need to stay alive in the cold.

Once you're ready, begin **extracting resources** and **building complex industries** with the **Create Mod**.
Set up **trains** to transport your goods across the icy landscape and experiment with various energy sources like **coal**, **oil**, **wind**, or **water power**.

Design your **cozy home**, decorate it with **furniture**, and make it a refuge from the storm.
Or simply **explore the world**, soak in its **atmosphere**, and uncover what lies hidden beneath the ice.

### 💻 PC Configuration

Since this modpack uses Fabric along with many optimization mods, it should run smoothly even on low-end computers.

### More
This modpack is inspired by the [Iron Frost Modpack](https://modrinth.com/modpack/iron-frost) by FyeMir and [Snowbound Modpack](https://modrinth.com/modpack/snowbound) by **AndrewWasTaken**
